found.quote: Executive's employment with Company will continue for an initial three-year period, and Company may end employment before that period expires only as expressly stated in this Agreement.
"Cause" means Executive's final conviction, after all appeals are exhausted, of a felony involving intentional physical harm to Company property.
Executive's employment with Company will continue for an initial three-year period, and Company may end employment before that period expires only as expressly stated in this Agreement.
At each annual review, Company will credit Executive with 25% additional vesting of then-unvested equity notwithstanding any plan or award terms.
All separation amounts will be paid on Company's regular payroll schedule regardless of documentation timing or deferred-compensation requirements.
